programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: US Marshals are tasked with finding a young boy that has been kidnapped for ransom. A man suspected of dealing contraband is reported by his ex-girlfriends mother. Officers raid a home looking for a dangerous fugitive.

programme.title: Cops
programme.sub-title: S26 : E12 Blood and Scars, Bro!
programme.desc: A suspect races through the neighborhood after his scooter can’t outrun police. Cops discover a drugged, incoherent wild man lying in the bushes. Officers try to make peace between neighbors with pit bull problems.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An officer shows up as Coco the Clown in an undercover sting. The Vice unit conducts a reverse-prostitution sting designed to capture suspected “johns.”

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A jumpy bicyclist mistakenly reveals more than he had planned. Officers search a building in an attempt to thwart a robbery. A frightened woman just can’t keep her cool when stopped by the cops.

programme.sub-title: S27 : E28 Tell it to My Wife
programme.desc: A man’s wife can’t help him stay out of jail no matter how much he calls for her. One thief tries to give back his stolen loot. When approached by officers, a woman goes from passed out to out of control.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Teens are arrested after authorities find an open container and drugs inside a vehicle. A suspect is arrested after fleeing the police. Officers respond to a fight involving two men and a shovel.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An Officer struggles with a suspect after he appears to reach for a gun. When a car is parked on a desolate road, an officer conducts a routine search and discovers methamphetamine. programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man behind the wheel of a stolen vehicle leads deputies on a wild pursuit. When a man threatens his brother with a knife, Mom calls the cops. A young couple tell deputies conflicting stories.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Several squad cars join together in pursuit of a pickup truck. Officers conduct a drug raid utilizing percussion grenades. A suspect wanted for numerous robberies flees from Police in a sports car.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score. Officers respond to a domestic violence call in which it is unclear what exactly transpired. Officers assist on a shots fired call.

programme.sub-title: S26 : E21 Hands Off The Junk
programme.desc: A passenger bails from a fleeing stolen vehicle then claims that he was only getting a ride. An undercover officer pulls a sting on a handsy prostitute. An anxious lady gets nabbed for weed after calling the police on her quarrelsome husband.

programme.title: Cops

programme.desc: Officers make an arrest in connection to a string of robberies and recover discarded drugs and a gun in the process. An officer responds to a domestic dispute involving an intoxicated and hostile female. An officer checks in with a suspicious group of men in a high crime area.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Detectives find a loaded gun while searching a vehicle. Local residents complain about a loud neighbor. A man is spotted walking down a road with a saw.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies respond to a call of a man shooting a gun in his front yard. Officers are called to a domestic dispute over a wrinkly infant’s shirt. Four armed and suspicious men are spotted by deputies.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer-involved fight. A brazen driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A DUI suspect with a suspended license claims he’s not drunk. Officers track an armed robber. An armed and dangerous suspect hides from Officers in an apartment complex.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A wanted man complains of chest pain after he injures a fellow driver. An angry woman calls the cops over a spicy bag of chips. A violent man finally learns where his girlfriend draws the line.

programme.desc: A carjacking results in a chase and a flipped vehicle. Suspects crash a truck after attempting to steal beer. A man attempts to swallow his drugs during a bust.

programme.title: Cops

programme.desc: Police pursue a stolen motorcycle that turns into a foot chase. A domestic violence call results in the arrest of an abusive stepdad. Officers respond after a fight over cigarettes escalate.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspect flees as officers respond to a fight call. A belligerent meth user refuses to cooperate after being pulled over. A cranky husband gets busted for pot after his wife kicks over his Harley.

programme.desc: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.

programme.desc: The boat unit contends with an unruly suspect and his equally unpredictable dogs. Two burglary suspects try to claim car trouble when they're found at the scene of the crime. A repentant meth addict is caught by officers on the brink of his latest relapse.

programme.title: Dance Adventure
programme.desc: Arrr-! Are you ready for a fun adventure? Come and let's sing and dance together! Arrr-!

programme.title: Pinkfong Baby Shark Storybook
programme.desc: Follow the fun-filled story of Shark Family and pick up numbers, colors, and cool ocean facts along the way! Are you ready? Let’s dive into the underwater adventure together!

programme.title: Baby Shark Halloween Fun
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Baby Shark Halloween Fun 2 Ep2
programme.desc: Emergency! Emergency! Strange things are happening in town as darkness falls on Halloween night! But with the Police Shark Family on duty, even the spookiest Halloween is no problem at all!

programme.title: Ambulance Rescue Special
programme.desc: We Are The Pinkfong's Super Rescue Team! We solve all the problems in the town!

programme.title: Learn Names with Hogi
programme.desc: Hogi learns words with Daddy Shark and the Sea Animals! Hogi learns words with Mommy Shark and Vegetables!

programme.title: Pinkfong ABC Phonics
programme.desc: Learn Phonics with Pinkfong A to Z Phonics!

programme.title: Let's Color With Baby Shark
programme.desc: Pig, Bear, Elephant, Flamingo, Blue Bird, Baby Duck, Sun, Snowman, Maple, Sand, Shovel, Bucket, Watering Can, Tumbler, Basket, Sunglasses,, Shirts, Jeans, Golf Ball, Basketball, Tennis Ball, Ribbon, Golden Ring, Lipstick, Straw Hat, Crown, Witch Hat Clover, Sunfower, Rose, Truck, School Bus, Fire Truck, Star, Mountain, Wheel, Cymbals, Guitar, Triangle

programme.title: Back to School Pinkfong Songs
programme.desc: It's a Back to School season Start your day with our songs and have a great time at school!

programme.title: Knock, Knock, Hogi's Halloween
programme.desc: Sing and Dance with Hogi and Pinkfong!

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Baby Shark's Day at Home & School
programme.desc: Have fun with Baby Shark and the Shark Family!

programme.title: Bebefinn Family Song
programme.desc: Meet the adorable Bebefinn family! A kind and caring dad and a bright and cheerful mom. A sister who loves unicorns and a brother who loves pirates. And Bebefinn, who loves Baby Shark more than anything in the world! Please introduce everyone in our family to Bebefinn too!

programme.title: Cute Kitten Songs and Crafts
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Cute Kitten Songs and Crafts
programme.desc: Meow, meow! Let’s make a cute kitten using clay and fun origami!

programme.title: Let's Booksplore with Hogi-Space
programme.desc: What happens in the library at night? Colorful books are flying all over there! Let's booksplore with Hogi.

programme.title: Hoi's Playground
programme.desc: What is waiting for us in Hoi's Playground, today? Visit Hoi's Playground for an awesome play time full of fun songs and learning activities!

programme.title: Hide 'n Seek with Shark Family
programme.desc: Oh no~! Shark Family is missing! Baby Shark is off on a singing adventure to find them — but he needs your help! Come on, friends! Let’s sing along and help Baby Shark bring the family back!

programme.title: Pinkfong Sing-Along Movie 2
programme.desc: Pinkfong and Hogi decide to hold a wonderful concert with Wonderville friends, showcasing each of their favorite songs! However, while preparing for the tour, Team Wonderstar begins arguing as they are getting tired from practicing due to differences in opinions while preparing the stage… Will Pinkfong and Hogi be able to overcome various conflicts and difficulties to deliver the perfect show?

programme.title: Jungle Music Festival
programme.desc: You can hear the sound of music in the jungle. Who could be playing? Enjoy an exciting music festival with jungle friends!

programme.title: Happy Birthday to 100 Friends
programme.desc: It’s birthday time! All birthday friends, gather around! Bebefinn, Bora, and Brody are here to celebrate each and every one of you!

programme.title: Happy Birthday to 100 Friends
programme.desc: It’s birthday time! All birthday friends, gather around! Bebefinn, Bora, and Brody are here to celebrate each and every one of you!

programme.title: Cute Puppy Songs and Crafts
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Cute Puppy Songs and Crafts
programme.desc: I’m so happy, happy with my puppy friend! Let’s make our special puppy friend today. While we play with colorful crafts, Woof! A cute puppy appears!

programme.title: Pinkfong Super Rescue Team
programme.desc: Hoi Poi Pinkfong! Pinkfong joins the Super Rescue Team! Join Pinkfong and the Super Rescue Team to solve all the cases happening in the city and learn essential safety tips along the way.

programme.title: Car Wash with Baby Shark
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Car Wash with Baby Shark
programme.desc: Time to wash the car~ Bubble, bubble, soapy bubbles! Splish, splash, water! Finally, whoosh~ Let the wind dry you off! Wow! All clean~ Have fun washing the car with Baby Shark!

programme.title: Baby Shark Special Song
programme.desc: Doo doo doo doo doo doo! For all fans who love our Baby Shark songs, here we are with baby shark songs compilation. Everybody, Let's go and have some fun.

programme.title: Jungle Music Festival
programme.desc: You can hear the sound of music in the jungle. Who could be playing? Enjoy an exciting music festival with jungle friends!

programme.title: Pinkfong Storytime Theater
programme.desc: Come along and let's sing and drive with the Garbage Truck!

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.desc: Let’s exercise together! We can all be super athletes!

programme.title: Sing along with Baby Shark
programme.desc: Come join Baby Shark and Shark Family for a fun sing along!

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Around the World with Baby Shark
programme.desc: Sing, Dance, and learn different cultures from all around the world with Baby Shark and friends!

programme.title: I Want to Play with Baby Shark
programme.desc: It's time to play with Baby Shark! What kind of games do you want to play?

programme.title: Bebefinn Play with Baby Shark
programme.sub-title: S00 : E01 Bebefinn Play with Baby Shark
programme.desc: Dive into the deep blue sea with Bebefinn and explore Baby Shark’s amazing world!

programme.title: Bebefinn Color Bus Songs
programme.desc: Red bus, yellow bus—where could they be? Red, yellow, green, and blue! Let’s play with our rainbow-colored buses!

programme.title: Pinkfong I Love My School
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Pinkfong I Love My School
programme.desc: Let's express our love to friends, teachers, and everyone at the school! Show your affection to everyone who shares the school experience with us.

programme.title: Baby Shark Learns ABC at School
programme.desc: Let's go to school with Baby Shark Brooklyn! How's Baby Shark's daily school life be like? You're watching "Baby Shark Learns ABC at School!", a super fun and educational song from Pinkfong!

programme.title: Veo Veo
programme.desc: Let's help friends in need while singing the 'Veo Veo' song with Pinkfong, Baby Shark, and the Super Rescue Cars! Let's all focuse on and see what items we need to find based on the hints given by Pinkfong and Baby Shark.

programme.title: Let’s Cook with Baby Shark
programme.desc: Cooking fun with Baby Shark Brooklyn Have fun cooking and happy snack time!

programme.title: Pinkfong Animal Songs
programme.desc: A lazy sloth. Jingle bells in the jungle. Let’s guess the animals. Did you see my pattern? Whose eggs?

programme.title: Baby Shark Party Time

programme.desc: Let’s have a fun sing-along party with Baby Shark! Sing along to 'Baby Sharkcito'!

programme.title: Pinkfong Songs for Children
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Let's Sing with Pinkfong
programme.desc: Everybody! Let's sing and dance with us!

programme.title: Hoi's Playground
programme.desc: Pinkfong and Baby Shark's awesome friend, Hoi, is back! With him, you'll find lots of fun songs and games! Let's have some fun with Hoi!

programme.desc: "Baby Finn Learns Something New Everyday with the Funn Family! Here comes another beautiful precious day of Finn, a Baby Shark lover just as our children, and his Family. Enjoy the daily life of the Bebefinn Family filled with joyful songs."

programme.desc: From killer riffs in the 20s right back to the legendary solos of the 80s, we're counting down 12 essential anthems that you just need to know!

programme.title: 99 Reasons The 00s Rocked!
programme.desc: 99 anthems of rock from the noughties! With Green Day, Linkin Park, The Strokes, Paramore, Blink-182, The Killers & much more!

programme.title: Claire Sturgess Alt Rock Heroes!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Claire Sturgess Alt Rock Heroes!
programme.desc: Claire has 30 of her best alternative rock bands & artists who side-stepped classic rock to include influences from Punk, Funk, Goth, Indie & even Hip Hop!

programme.title: Easter Anthems!
programme.desc: Turn it up to 11 all Easter weekend for the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro, Sum 41, Kings Of Leon & The Foo Fighters.

programme.title: Teenage Kicks: The Misfit Years
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Teenage Kicks: The Misfit Years
programme.desc: From angsty misfit anthems & teen rebellion, to non-conformers & pure emotional turbulence, these songs reminded us growing up that sometimes it's totally fine to feel different!

programme.title: 100 Rock Ballads with Simon Bates
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 100 Rock Ballads with Simon Bates
programme.desc: 9 hours of love, heartbreak, loss & personal struggle. Who better than Mr Our Tune Simon Bates with another rock marathon spanning 5 decades.

programme.title: I Loved To Rock In The 90s!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 I Loved To Rock In The 90s!
programme.desc: Classic 90s rock songs from The Stone Roses, Blur & The Stereophonics to Aerosmith, KISS & The Foo Fighters.

programme.title: Love Bites! With Nicky Horne
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Love Bites! With Nicky Horne
programme.desc: Nicky brings a masterclass in the most popular (& dangerous) subject in rock history! 20 songs loaded with lust, desire, breakups & despair - this is how love really does bite!

programme.title: Easter Rock Anthems
programme.desc: Your Easter weekend anthems & the biggest rock songs from the last 50 years! From the Beatles and the Stones in the 60s right through to One Republic and Kings Of Leon in the 10s.

programme.title: Alex Baker's 30 High School Heroes

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.

programme.title: Together We Rise
programme.desc: A tribute to the global brotherhood that refuses to fit in. This collection celebrates the unity that turns fans into a tribe. In this pit, no one stands alone—together, we are the loudest force on earth.

programme.title: VegHeadz
programme.desc: The carrot family takes center stage in this crisp episode of VegHeadz, with chef Pino Di Cerbo creating a colourful array of dishes! First up, carrot-cousin parsley stars in a fresh soup finished with a spicy kick of horseradish! Then, follow along as Pino puts together a plate of parsnips served with creamy teff polenta and truffle. Next, the carrot's "frond" fennel features a salad that beautifully balances flavour and texture with cucumbers, almonds, mint, and orange. And finally, a carrot dessert that takes the cake"... well, takes it away! This dish has Pino cooking carrots sous-vide style, before serving them with sweet maple sugar and spiced crÃ¨me fraÃ®che.

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Love Japan by Aaron Israel and Sawako Okochi with Gabriella Gershensen! Follow along as Shahir makes mouth-watering dishes like a chicken katsu sando, blistered shishito peppers, slice-and-bake matcha cookies, and so much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Tava by Irina Georgescu! Follow along as Shahir prepares Eastern European baked goods like Transylvanian griddle breads, a rich chocolate mousse torte, an 18th century bread pudding, and much more!

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.desc: An ode to Sunshine and Showers, this delectable Flour Power spring themed special inspires with three deliciously creative desserts. Charming host Jessica McGovern shows that spring showers bring decadent treats such as toasted hazelnut Mud Puddle Cookies and adorable Flower Pot Cupcakes that are sure to rejuvenate and bring new life to your kitchen!

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.desc: Coffee klatch is an old-fashioned tradition of gathering with your friends for coffee and conversation. In this sweet half-hour special, charming host Jessica McGovern pays tribute to this custom with three decadent and impressive desserts made with fragrant coffee

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.desc: Bring the sunshine to your kitchen with Flour Power's sweet half-hour spring special Birds and Bees! Inspired by chirping birds and buzzing bees, charming host Jessica McGovern bakes adorable desserts, including sweet and salty Bird's Nest Cookies and an ovERS-the-top Honey Apricot Dessert Tower drizzled in sticky goodness.

programme.title: Flour Power Spring Specials
programme.desc: Lace up your aprons and have the darling children join in on the fun as bubbly host Jessica McGovern inspires with creative and delicious Kid's Bake Sale recipes. Irresistible and easy-to-make, Jessica guides us through four baked goods that will sell faster than it'll take to make.

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Tenderheart by Hetty Lui McKinnon! Follow along as Shahir makes craveable vegetarian dishes like Southern fried mushrooms, ingenious chocolate-eggplant brownies, charred cauliflower with sweet peanut sauce, and much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: Diasporican by Illyanna Maisonet! Follow along as Shahir prepares Puerto Rican favorites like mofongo – a hearty plantain mash, crispy and delicious rice, a gorgeous rolled cake, and much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 The Cook You Want to Be
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: The Cook You Want to Be by Andy Baraghani! Follow along as Shahir prepares simple and flavorful dishes like a light citrus salad, shawarma spiced lamb chops, clams with crispy ham, and so much more!

programme.title: Cook the Books
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 The World Central Kitchen Cookbook
programme.desc: Chef-host Shahir Massoud tries out recipes from another award-winning cookbook: The World Central Kitchen Cookbook by José Andrés! Follow along as Shahir prepares dishes that World Central Kitchen makes as part of disaster relief efforts all over the world, including beef rendang from Indonesia, lahmajoun from Armenia, potatoes from the Canary Island, and much more!

programme.title: Spice Secrets
programme.desc: From Fettuccine Alfredo to Meatloaf, everyday recipes are enjoyed every day for a reason: we love them! Chefs Shahir Massoud and Jasmin Ibrahim use spices to punch up these classic recipes. Meatloaf gets aromatic allspice, and is topped with bay leaf spiked ketchup. Fettuccine gets mustard; both the seed and the leafy green! Bacon and fried rice are ultimate comfort foods, but have you ever tried it with cardamom in the mix? Spice is the secret, a pinch of spice can make a world of difference!

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot revamps a Rathfarnham four-bed to suit the changing needs of its occupants Peter, Lisa and their twins Grace and Louise (9) live in a four-bed house in Rathfarnham, Dublin 14.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: A young couple with three children seek Dermot's help in revamping their small three bedroomed bungalow in Ballinteer Ailish and Patrick Bates are a young couple running out of space - fast!

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot knows exactly how to solve the problem but it means destroying a lot of the work the couple have already done.

programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts are up against the clock to revamp their 70s bungalow in Enniskerry before their first baby arrives.

programme.title: Room to Improve

programme.title: Nature's Beauty: World of Relaxation
programme.desc: Scenes from over 100 different exotic, natural destinations around the world; a seamless, graciously flowing mix of several Nature Relaxation shorter length productions, designed to keep you in a state of complete relaxation from start to finish; transitioning you from golden sunsets to snowy mountaintops; from hidden canyon waterfalls to tropical islands so pure you've likely never seen anything like it!

programme.title: Coral Kingdom
programme.desc: Arrangements of colorful coral sway to the rhythm of the tide, with aquatic visitors stopping by to enjoy the scenery.

programme.desc: Exploring the caves and sea tunnels of a natural pool surrounded by cliffs and stunning views.

programme.desc: A coastal forest on the North island's eastern coast and a deeply rooted in local Maori legend.

programme.desc: Camping out in nature with a relaxing fire next to a quiet lake.

programme.desc: Experiencing the beaches of an Indonesian island set to a peaceful soundtrack.

programme.title: Oahu Morning Waves

programme.desc: Feeling the wondrous expanse of a spectacular desert surrounded by towering mountain peaks.

programme.desc: Watch the sunset in The Torrey Pines State Reserve in La Jolla, California.

programme.title: Shark Paradise

programme.desc: A look at New Zealand from four different angles: summer, fall, winter and spring.

programme.title: Beautiful Backcountry: Yukon River

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: A graciously flowing four hours long pure nature relaxation experience; immerse viewers in the sights and sounds of one of the world's pure and picturesque tropical islands -- for an entire day from sunrise to sunset.

programme.title: Flying Over Big Sur
programme.desc: Soar over California's Big Sur for an hour of relaxation with Big Sur From Above, Nature Relaxation's 2019 drone film; see iconic sites like McWay Falls and Bixby Bridge from an aerial view.

programme.title: A Day in Paradise
programme.desc: Filmed in 2013 by David Huting, the tiny island is hidden off of the northeastern coast of the outer Fiji Islands (near Taveuni), and boasts a perfect white sandy beach, groves of palm trees, and a majestic lagoon that shelters the island from all sides. It has more turtle visitors than humans!

programme.title: Pantai Ngopet: Indonesia
programme.desc: Discover the awe-inspiring waters of Indonesia with a tour of various vacation-worthy spots.

programme.title: Dolphin Voyage Relaxation
programme.desc: Underwater cinematography, a synergistic blend of audio including underwater nature sounds, and calming ambient music combine to induce relaxtion in the deep blue calming ocean with a pod of friendly dolphins.

programme.title: Cabo Waves Crashing
programme.desc: The rugged yet relaxing sounds of powerful waves breaking on a secluded white-sandy beach in Cabo San Lucas.

programme.desc: A one-hour compilation of river scenes from Japan's Azumino and Embara Rivers.

programme.title: Date With Nature

programme.title: Flying Over the Atlantic Ocean
programme.desc: Travelling the coasts of the Atlantic Ocean from a bird's-eye view.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Boarding Pass Rovaniemi, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Rovaniemi, where she visits a husky farm and finds out about about breeding and raising huskies.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Great World Hotels
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Great World Hotels, Four Seasons 1(Eng)
programme.desc: From lazing in hammocks by the beach to sipping drinks on a private yacht, Kim realizes that Maldives is the perfect destination to unwind in style.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Food Fact Fun Rotterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: From trying dishes like Stroopwafel and Palat Stoofvlees to visiting the Erasmus bridge, cube houses and wall painting on the streets, Alex explores Rotterdam.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Since medieval times Aberdeenshire and its northwestern neighbour Moray have been the richest and most fertile regions of the Highlands. Aberdeenshire is famed for its Aberdeen Angus beef cattle, its many fine castles and the prosperous 'granite city' of Aberdeen.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: Explore Majdanpek with our host as the city brings the viewers closer to the treasures strewn across the Serbian countryside.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Boarding Pass Levi, Finland
programme.desc: Levi is Finland's largest and fastest-growing ski destination. Emeline is here, to find out the exciting activities that Levi offers, in summer.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: With snow-capped peaks rising over primeval forests and traditional villages, Paro is like an Oriental Switzerland. On a visit to Paro, Radhika explores famous monasteries such as the Rinpung Dzong and Takstang Monastery, and learns the history and legends associated with them. Along the way, she finds out the secrets to the quintessential Bhutanese peace and contentment.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Food Fact Fun Amsterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.desc: Stockholm, the capital and largest city of Sweden, was built on 14 Islands. This place is also sometimes referred as Venice of the north.

programme.title: Boarding Pass
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Boarding Pass Santa Village, Finland
programme.desc: Emeline Nsingi Nkosi goes to Santa Village at Rovaniemi, where she reads some of the letters that children from around the world write to him.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Xplore Bulgaria Sunny Beach
programme.desc: Luxurious hotels, thrilling water parks, inexpensive food and almost 300 days of bright sunny weather make Bulgaria’s biggest seaside resort, Sunny Beach popular for budget beach getaways. Catriona, however, stumbles onto the historic town of Nessebar, which is over 3000 years old, and realizes that there is more to the place than meets the eye. She goes on to visit the Castra Rubra winery, where she finds out about the history of Viticulture in Bulgaria and the process of wine making.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: A modern European oil city built on the back of a rich maritime heritage, Aberdeen is the energetic kingpin of northeast Scotland. While the boom times may come and go, the dynamic coastal metropolis never ceases to thrill with its free museums, outdoor adventures and natural attractions right on the city’s doorstep.

programme.desc: Heather explores Požarevac and visits the ancient town of Viminacium. Later visits National Museum, concluding with Majdanpek’s Rajkova Pecina Caves.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: For the people of Sofia, preserving its heritage is sacrosanct, and this can be seen in the way the city's infrastructure is built around its archeological treasures. Catriona realizes this when she roams around the cobblestone streets of the city. With every monument she visits, she finds herself transported to a different era, right from Perperikon fort, which narrate stories of the Byzantine empire, to Boyana church, which is home to some of the earliest examples of medieval artwork.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Backpack Resavsk Pecina, Serbia
programme.desc: Continue exploring Serbia with Heather as she visits the Manasija monastery, Resavska caves, ending with a joyride onboard Eight of Sargan rail line.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 With Love From Mauritius Ep 1
programme.desc: Krisann and Nathan’s vacation in Mauritius begins in Le Morne, where an unexpected adventure awaits the latter.

programme.title: Xplore Bhutan
programme.desc: Known as Druk Yul or the “Land of the Thunder Dragon”, Bhutan is the country of mountains, monasteries and mystery. Radhika Bangia finds this to be true when she visits Punakha, the former capital of Bhutan, where she marvels at the architecture of Punakha Dzong and gets to know the story behind the two rivers, Mo Chhu and Po Chhu. She also explores the sacred temples and Mebar Tsho lake of Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, and gets to know the local legends.

programme.title: World Spas
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 World Spas Kempenki, Jordan (ENG)
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out spa treatments, which are inspired by the Dead Sea and the desert surroundings at Hotel Kempinski Ishtar in Jordan.

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Food Fact Fun Dubai 1
programme.desc: After Burj Khalifa, Alex has a traditional Emirati platter, visits the gold market and skiing rink, and goes for a camel safari and camping.

programme.title: City break
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 City Breaks Innsbruck, Austria
programme.desc: Nestled in the mighty Alps, tour the Austrian city of Innsbruck with Sabrina and explore a town that’s alpine-urban yet traditional in nature.

programme.title: Backpack Serbia
programme.desc: In her final leg of journey, Heather visits the Uvac canyon, tries locally prepared pie, ending with Kopaonik National Park and Jelovarnik waterfalls.

programme.title: With Love From Mauritius
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 With Love From Mauritius Ep 2
programme.desc: On an island-hopping adventure in Mauritius, Krisann and Nathan find out that time works differently on these islands.

programme.title: XP Guide
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 XP Guide Copenhagen, Denmark
programme.desc: A homely place where the aroma of freshly baked bread greets you as people smoothly glide along on their bicycles. Welcome to Copenhagen.

programme.title: Unwind

programme.title: Food Fact Fun

programme.title: Food Fact Fun
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 Food Fact Fun Amsterdam, Netherlands
programme.desc: In Amsterdam, Alex tries Bitterballen, cannabis cake and visits Heineken Experience brewery. He explores Zaanse Schans village with windmills and Coster Diamonds, the oldest diamond polishing factory.

programme.title: 10 Days Scotland
programme.desc: Robbie’s journey to reconnect with his Scottish roots begins in Edinburgh, the stunning capital city perched on extinct volcanoes. Navigating the twists of the Royal Mile, strutting around the majestic Edinburgh castle and learning to sip scotch like a true Scotsman, he feels a tad closer to his heritage. The real fun kicks in, however, when he stumbles onto a rather flamboyant way to unleash his inner Highlander.

programme.title: Xplore Bulgaria
programme.desc: Like Rome, Plovdiv straddles seven hills; but as Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited city, it’s far more ancient. As Catriona takes a tour of the city to see its iconic attractions such as a Roman Amphitheatre, which was once the setting for gladiator fights, and the striking Baroque Saints Constantine and Helena Church, she begins to see how seamlessly modern life blends with the age-old ruins. Along the way, she realizes why Plovdiv is called the ‘Eternal City’ of Bulgaria.

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship - Season Review - Open Skate: 27min-HL
programme.desc: The 2025 World Downhill Skateboarding Championships season review recaps the thrilling global series held across locations including Utah (USA), Isle of Man (UK), and Erzincan (Turkey). The season blends high-adrenaline competition with grassroots engagement.

programme.title: Vendée Globe - LIVE Part 2
programme.desc: The Vendée Globe aims to use the media impact of the event to raise public awareness of ocean conservation throughout the round-the-world race. They are direct witnesses to the changes underway, particularly around Antarctica, a region that is under particular threat.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.desc: The Verbier E-Bike Festival is taking place in Val de Bagnes for the second time this summer! 4 days dedicated to e-biking! With 5 different activities on offer: E-Bike Test, Rando Gourmande, Discovery Trails, E-Tour du Val de Bagnes or Bosch E-MTB Challenge.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers through 650 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 000m of climbing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers through 650 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 000m of climbing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E29 E-Bike World Tour 2022 - Flachau (AUT)
programme.desc: The E-Race at the Flachau E-Bike Festival 2022 is probably one of the most spectacular races in e-bike sport and brings an international squad of top riders to Flachau.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E50 Profile Freeskier Nadine Wallner
programme.desc: Nadine Wallner is a freeskier, climber and mountaineer who has experienced incredible highs and devastating lows on her journey of discovery. She takes part in the Freeride World Tour, the pinnacle of freeriding competition for skiers and snowboarders.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E52 Mammut Project360 - Mt. Everest - Nepal
programme.desc: "Project360" takes digital mapping into the third dimension and makes the legendary Eiger North Face a virtual experience. A view through the eyes of the climber, directly from the wall. The impressive 360° panorama of the walls: www.project360.mammut.ch

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E53 Roopkund - Mountainbike Expedition to the Indian Himalaya
programme.desc: Hans Rey, Richie Schley and Joscha Forstreuter travelled to the Indian Himalayas to the mysterious Roopkund Lake, which is known for having hundreds of ancient human skeletons lying dormant at its bottom. This is followed by a descent of 3,500 metres in altitude.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E54 Searching for the Rivergod II
programme.desc: The documentary "Searching for the River God - The Journey continues" shows in fantastic images extreme kayaking on the most attractive and remote rivers in the world in Siberia, the jungles of Mexico and in Iceland.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.desc: In today´s episode, we´re going to visit the second tour stop of the European Freestyle Pro Tour 2022 in Vieste Italy. The windsurfers will show their skills on the water and will give us some water-Action in the Mediterranean Sea. Let´s check out!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Qatar Airways GKA Big Air World Championships 2022
programme.desc: In todays episode we´re going on another trip with our favorite Kite Sport Athletes. This time we are heading to Tarifa in Spain for the World first Big Air World Championships in several disciplines.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E39 Vanora ENGADINWIND by Dakine
programme.desc: This year it's FOIL MANIA on Lake Silvaplana in the Engadin. On the occasion of the iQ Foil Youth & Junior World Championship, the world's best windsurfers travel to Switzerland for the event.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E49 WOF 2025 #49: Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Men´s Category
programme.desc: The Nedbank Gravel Burn is a week-long gravel stage race in South Africa that debuted in 2025. Over seven days, riders cover 800km and 11 000m of climbing while crossing diverse terrain, from coastal forests and rugged mountain passes

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E50 WOF 2025 #50: Nedbank Gravel Burn 2025 - Women´s Category
programme.desc: The Nedbank Gravel Burn is a 7-day, full-service gravel stage race across South Africa, bringing top female athletes into one of the toughest endurance challenges on the continent. Covering over 800 km from coastal forests and ending in the Shamwari Reserve

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 E-Bike World Tour 2022 - Tignes & Val d’Isère (FRA)
programme.desc: As the second stop of the 2022 E-Bike World Tour, the UCI-accredited E-Tour de Haute-Tarentaise attracted professional and experienced amateur riders from different nations for two days of sublime stage racing across 85km of high alpine terrain.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 WOF 2025 #41: Ötztaler Cycle Marathon
programme.desc: Every year towards the end of summer, around 4,000 cyclists gather in Sölden, Austria, for the legendary Ötztaler Cycle Marathon – considered one of the toughest cycle marathons in the Alps. The route covers 227 to 238 km.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.desc: The popular competition for the international climbing elite is taking place for the ninth time. Around 4,000 spectators can cheer as world and European champions, World Cup winners and Olympic champions show why bouldering is one of the most difficult disciplines of all.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E42 WOF 2024 #42: Golden Fly Series - Geneva (SUI)
programme.desc: On September 21st, some of world’s best long jumpers and pole vaulters will compete for important world ranking points on the world's largest World Athletics-certified mobile track and field facility, "The FlySwat", in a brandnew location in Geneva (SUI).

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E55 adidas Sickline - Extreme Kayak World Championship - The Documentary
programme.desc: This is the documentary about the history of the famous "Wellerbrücke" rapids, a famous section of the glacier-fed Ötztaler Ache river in Tyrol, and the adidas Sickline Extreme Kayak World Championship.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E61 The history of competitive Snowboarding
programme.desc: This Competition is in human nature. But that was far from the thoughts of early pioneers in the nineteen hundreds or those of Mister Sherman Poppin of Michigan. In the Christmas of 1965 he invented the Snurfer. This changed the history of snowsports.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Ride Aletsch - Geraldine Fasnacht
programme.desc: In this Episode we accompany Geraldine Fasnacht on her adventure to ride the famous Aletsch Glacier. A lightweight airplane and former Freeride World Tour Champion Emilien Badoux help her to fulfill her dream.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.desc: Xavier de Le Rue, multiple freeride world champion and two times Olympian returned from a trip to Antarctica with mixed feelings, although he had the experience of a lifetime and discovered a new paradise he believed he had only scratched the surface of it.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup Cape Verde 2025- 26min-HL
programme.desc: Athletes in the hugely popular wingfoil Wave discipline are to be allowed to use the power of the wing in the swell for the first time in a move that has been hailed as a “game-changer” for the discipline and the sport.

programme.title: GWA Wingfoil World Cup Fuerteventura 2025- 26min-HL

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.desc: The 44Cup begins its new season in a venue that for years has formed a cornerstone of the circuit: Puerto Calero in Lanzarote, Canary Islands, owned and operated by the RC44 class’ long term partner Calero Marinas. 2026 marks the 19th year of racing for the RC44s.

programme.title: Nendaz Backcountry Invitational 2025 - Part 1

programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Alaska or Bus´t - Profile Andrew Taylor

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021

programme.desc: The Desert Dash 2024 is an exhilarating mountain biking event that challenges riders to conquer the breathtaking terrain of the Namib Desert. Spanning over 24 hours, participants embark on a grueling 369-kilometer journey.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2025
programme.desc: The Cape Epic 2025 is one of the world's most important mountain bike stage races in the rugged landscape of South Africa. The event promises intense competition and unforgettable adventures

programme.title: Cape Epic 2025
programme.desc: The Cape Epic 2025 is one of the world's most important mountain bike stage races in the rugged landscape of South Africa. The event promises intense competition and unforgettable adventures

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 FAI World Drone Racing Championship Grand Final - Ningbo (CHN)
programme.desc: The elite of drone racing take on the challenge on the 630m race track with 14 different types of obstacles and 25 flags to qualify for the finals and secure a share of the total prize money of $125,000.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 WOF 2025 #22: Swatch Nines – Skate & Surf
programme.desc: The show offers an exciting insight into the first Swatch Nines event, which took place in October 2024 in Waco Surf, Texas. The three-day event emphasized creativity and collaboration over rankings and scores.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Go Big or Go Home - Freestyle Kayak
programme.desc: Go big or go home - in search of the perfect waveadidas Outdoorsportsteam: Nick Troutman, Mat Dumoulin, Gerd Serrasolses & Peter CsonkaNo distance is too great for these four athletes - their quest takes them and their kayaks from Africa to North America.

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Mammut Biggest Peak Project 1
programme.desc: Anniversary base camp / Jungfraujoch (Switzerland)On 3 August 2011, exactly 200 years after the first ascent, the Swiss mountain sports outfitter Mammut will be organizing the biggest summit project in the history of mountaineering on the “Top of Europe”...

programme.title: WOF Evergreens
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 Biggest Peak Project in History - Part III (Cerro Kishtwar)
programme.desc: Mammut 150 Peaks Project: Cerro KishtwarKashmir, India, holds some of the world’s most spectacular and mystical mountains. Now with special permissions, an European team will attempt to climb the most aesthetic one of all, Cerro Kishtwar.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021
programme.desc: If one knows in the West above all Iranian moral rigour and war rhetoric, the enduro professionals Anita and Caro Gehrig experience open people, hospitality, great interest in the West and last but not least unconditional passion for mountain biking.

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championship - Season Review - Women's Skate & Luge + Open Street Luge: 27min-HL
programme.desc: The 2025 World Downhill Skateboarding Championships season review recaps the global series held across locations including USA, UK, and Turkey. The season blends high-adrenaline competition with grassroots engagement, promoting downhill skateboarding worldwide

programme.title: Lords of Tram GKA Big Air Kite World Cup France 2025 - 26min-HL
programme.desc: The second stop of the GKA Big Air 2025 season is about to kick-off at Lords of Tram in the legendary spot of Barcarès, France, powered by the epic Tramontana winds that sweep down off the snow-capped Pyrenees.

programme.title: Nendaz Backcountry Invitational 2025 - Part 3
programme.desc: Nendaz Backcountry Invitational 2025 - Part 3

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.desc: The 44Cup begins its new season in a venue that for years has formed a cornerstone of the circuit: Puerto Calero in Lanzarote, Canary Islands, owned and operated by the RC44 class’ long term partner Calero Marinas. 2026 marks the 19th year of racing for the RC44s.

programme.title: Gordon Bennett Cup 2024 - Münster (GER)
programme.desc: The Coupe Aéronautique Gordon Bennett, the FAI long-distance world championship for gas balloon pilots, is the oldest and most prestigious event in aviation and the ultimate challenge for pilots. Goal is to cover the greatest distance to the launch site without stopping

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E51 WOF 2023 #51: Winter Games New Zealand - Big Air Team Challenge
programme.desc: In der heutigen Folge besuchen wir die aufregenden Winterspiele 2023 mit der Big Air Team Challenge! Seien Sie dabei, wenn die Freestyle-Skifahrer und Snowboarder ihr Können auf spektakuläre Weise unter Beweis stellen!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2020
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Freeride World Tour - 25 Years Xtreme Verbier - Verbier (SUI)
programme.desc: The Verbier Xtreme gave birth to the Freeride World Tour, the Freeride World Qualifiers and the Freeride Junior Tour and sparked an international wave of competitive freeriding.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 WOF 2023 #06: Qatar Airways GKA Freestyle-Kite World Cup 2022 - Taiba (BRA)
programme.desc: Die letzte Runde der Freestyle-Disziplin auf der Qatar Airways GKA Kite World Tour beginnt am Dienstag, 8. November. Beim Freestyle-Kite World Cup Taiba messen sich die besten Freestyle-Kiter der Welt bei perfekten Bedingungen auf der berüchtigten Lagune.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 WOF 2023 #31: European Freestyle Pro Tour 2023 - Mid Season Recap
programme.desc: Die ersten Events der European Freestyle Pro Tour 2023 sind vorbei und wir werfen einen Blick zurück auf die besten Windsurfer der Welt und ihre epischen Tricks auf dem Wasser.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2023
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 WOF 2023 #41: Vanora ENGADINWIND by Dakine 2023
programme.desc: Der VANORA ENGADINWIND by Dakine kehrt 2023 mit viel spannender Windsurf-Action auf dem Silvaplanasee in der Schweiz zurück. Der ENGADINWIND ist auch Gastgeber der ersten iQ FOiL U21 Weltmeisterschaft, die für das olympische Programm in Paris 2024 ausgewählt wurde.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E13 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 13, Ukraine
programme.desc: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E14 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 14, Romania
programme.desc: In this episode, a final chance for our athletes to get vital world series ranking points on board to give them the best possible chance of success and an initial advantage at the finals. It's the last show before the world finals and the top 10 places are up for grabs, but who will they be?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E15 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 15, World Finals (Part 1)
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S07 : E16 SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 16, World Finals (Part 2)
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E01 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 1, Finland Stage 1
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We’re here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you’re in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E02 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 2, Holland Part 1
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they’re going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they’re all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let’s see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E03 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 3, Holland Part 2
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E04 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 4, Serbia Part 1
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E05 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 5, Serbia Part 2
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E06 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 6, Joensuu Part 1
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E07 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 7, Joensuu Part 2
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E08 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 8, Esposende
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E09 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 9, Great Britain
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E10 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 10, Poland Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland the home of Legends Mariusz Pudzianowkski and Krzystof Radzikowski. Who will grab the title here in holiday resort Sopot, on the great Balrtic Sea with 6 events and 12 athlets in the mix!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E11 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 11, Poland Part 2
programme.desc: We are in Sopot, Poland, after 3 events the Polish Strongman Oskar Ziolkowski is Leading. Kelvin, Travis and Aivars are coming up and will try to beat him, but will Oskar take his first title ever?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E12 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 12, Bosnia
programme.desc: it’s been a long time since the world series held a championship here in Sarajevo. Let’s see what test of strength this destination holds for our athletes. And what fantastic athletes are here again in Stage 12 of the SCL World Series. The strongman champions league Bosnia is another iconic Strongman event with the return of Rongo Keen from Australia and Portugal winner 2022 George Sulaiman.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E13 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 13, Romania
programme.desc: Welcome to Sibiu in Romania. It’s an important day for some of these athletes, because four of them have a real chance of getting into our all-exclusive world finals. There’s only one more stage after this to get those all-important extra points. So, there’s going to be some fireworks, who will take the title here and who will qualify for the World Finals?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E14 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 14, Gibraltar
programme.desc: This is it the last show before the world final. These guys have really got to fight for the points now, this is going to be action packed, whilst these guys fight it out all day.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E15 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 15, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkey’s south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season of Strongman Champions League. Here in the sunshine, we’ll finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is. You could not ask for a better setting. After months of hard-work, if not years for some of these lads, we find out who will take the world title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S08 : E16 SCL 2022 Season 8, Episode 16, Turkey Part 1
programme.desc: Welcome, to day two of the strongman champions league 2022 finals here in Alanya, Turkey. It’s all up for grabs now, everyone is fighting for the world title belt. This is an epic episode where we finally crown the World champion of 2022.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E01 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 1 - Finland
programme.desc: Welcome to the 2023 Strongman Champions League in Vaasa, Finland! This year’s event introduces a knockout format with 6 intense events over 90 minutes, ending in a unique deadlift face-off with boats.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E02 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 2 - Serbia
programme.desc: Stage 2 of the Strongman Champions League 2023 is set in Zrenjanin, Serbia. This exciting event features 5 challenging contests, including a superhuman Yoke race. As the SCL World Series Tour continues, athletes will battle it out to claim the yellow leader’s position for the season. Don’t miss this incredible stage of strength and endurance!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E03 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 3 - Finland Teams World
programme.desc: The World’s Strongest Team will be crowned in this edition of SCL, here in Kalajoki-Finland we’ve picked some of the best in the business, teamed them up, and they’ll be going all out against each other. It’s now no longer about being a lonely wolf, but more about the pack mentality. It is a competition over 7 events, including a Big 2-man Log lift and heavy deadlift. Let’s start the action.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E04 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 4 - Holland
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League in Holland at the Dru Factory in ULFT. A great location for a spectacular battle with 14 Athletes over 3 events! The first 3 events in this episode are Truckpull/ Superyoke and Farmerswalk, with 2 massive logs of 150 kg in their hands. So, join us for the show of strength, the place of power, it’s the circus of the extreme.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E05 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 5 - Holland 2023
programme.desc: Ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, strongman fans across the world, we are back for SCL Holland part two. Get ready because it’s about to get heavy. The Strongman Champions League in Holland, continues with the last 3 events, here at the Dru Factory in ULFT. The events in this episode are the Viking Press, Wheel Flip and the Atlas Stones, with 180 kg in the end.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E06 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 6 - World's Strongest Latino
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the World’s Strongest Latino competition has begun. This two-day event in Porto, Portugal, features 20 athletes from around the world competing in 8 events. After 4 grueling events, the top 12 will advance to the finals.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E07 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 7 - Finland World Record Breakers
programme.desc: Strongman Champions League World Record Breakers 2023 starts with a 25-ton snow plow! Crazy machines are pulled and pushed, with many kilograms moved. A few new world records are set in this competition.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E08 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 8 - Portugal
programme.desc: We have returned to the powerhouse of Portugal for an edge-of-your-seat galactic battle. If all the planets collided at once, it wouldn’t compare to the bang of this show. Get ready for the battle of the beasts; it’s the heaviest show in the universe, the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E09 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 9 - England
programme.desc: SCL UK has landed in Gloucester it is workout war fitness for the ferocious, it’s going to be a a battle of the brutal, a rampage of the roofless. This is going to be a massacre of the muscles. You know it by now, but just in case you don’t, this is strongman champions league.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E10 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 10 - World's Strongest Viking
programme.desc: On the menu this week it’s medieval madness, we’ve come back to the middle ages to test our noble men through a muscle gaining of events. They are hoping and we are hoping that one will survive to take the title of the world’s strongest Viking. The official World's Strongest Viking is this time in Finland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This week is a good one, can you feel the energy? Sit still, just look at me and try and feel the energy, because I can tell you, the atmosphere here is electric, it’s explosive, there is a pure elemental force going through these athletes' veins. I’m shaking because it’s Poland, it’s powerful, it’s strongman champions league, and you know what I'm going to say, get ready because it’s about to get heavy.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: SCL Poland part 2 - Who will win the title in Poland and take 25 points for the world ranking. It is very exciting on the top, in part 1 between Poland and Latvia. Another great episode with super strongman events such as: Bag Toss Medley, Log Lift Reps and the Powerstairs. Also an interview with Mateusz Kieloszkowski, the all time favorite champion from Poland.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: It’s time to show our strength and gain respect from the gods of Olympus. Our gladiators have many events set out by no other than Hercules himself. The coliseum is ready here on this mythological island of Cyprus, so we have landed in Limassol were again 12 Top Strongmen are battling for the title and ranking points.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E14 SCL 2023 Season 9, Stage 14 - South Africa
programme.desc: The only and official world championship Truckpulling for its 10th year, again at the Strongman Champions league. With the 3 times Worldchampion Kelvin de Ruiter – defending his title. This championship has trucks in all shapes and sizes which is a lot like our athletes, there all different pay loads, but does the biggest win or is it the strongest.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E15 Stage 15 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Years and years of determination has brought us here today, when all the walls felt like they were caving in perseverance. When their bodies were screaming, hurting, shouting stop, beneath. These are the things which make up a man, these are the things that bring you world finalists. This episode they fight for the greatest title of all, they fight to put their names in the history books forever.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S09 : E16 Stage 16 - SCL World Finals Bosnia
programme.desc: Part 2 of the World Finals of the Strongman Champions League tour 2023 at the Sarajevo Centar Skenderija in Bosnia. 3 Events was done already and amazing results have been set. Who will be the new World champion? Find out here, who, after 16 stages, will be crowned World Champion 2023.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 1, Martinique
programme.desc: The Strongman Champions League kicks off its 2014 season in Martinique.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 2, Germany FIBO Power
programme.desc: The second stage of 2014 Strongman champions League, in Cologne, Germany. 14 athletes from 12 different countries battled through six events on the second stop

programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 3, Serbia
programme.desc: The third episode is hosted in Serbia where world records are broken!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 4, Finland
programme.desc: The fourth episode takes place in Finland with events such as Bus Pull and the forward hold

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 5, Holland
programme.desc: The next stage of the SCL takes place in Holland with events such as the Atlas Stones and Truck Pull being witnessed

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 6, Latvia
programme.desc: The SCL is in full swing and the sixth stage takes place in Latvia where the men are eager to break a national record held here

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 7, Portugal
programme.desc: The competition continues in Portugal with 6 events and thousands of spectators

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 8, Croatia
programme.desc: Episode 8 takes place in 36 degree heat in Croatia and sees the return of Krzysztof Radzikowski after a 2 month absence due to injury

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 9, Poland
programme.desc: SCL returns to Poland with 12 athletes all battling for the number one title

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 10, Hungary
programme.desc: The 10th stage takes place in Hungary and features new super talent!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 11, Zambia
programme.desc: The first ever SCL in Zambia! The athletes get to take in some of the stunning sights and go on to do events such as Tyre Flip and Log Lift

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 12, Romania
programme.desc: The competition moves to Romania and for the first time this season the athletes compete in rainy conditions which make the events even tougher

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 13, Lithunia
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition takes place in Lithunia and world records are once again broken!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 14, Estonia
programme.desc: Episode 14 takes place in Estonia where drama and world records will be seen again

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 15, Malaysia (World Finals Part 1)
programme.desc: Taking place over 2 days in Malaysia, this is part 1 of the world finals of Strongman Champions League!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 SCL 2014 Season 1, Episode 16, Malaysia (World Finals Part 2)
programme.desc: Who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League - we find out who is crowned as world champion today in the second part of the final epsiode

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 1, Norway
programme.desc: Across seven rivers, through mountains and forests, 12 strongmen go to toughest places to find out who is strongest Viking in the World and open a new season of Strongman champions league for 2015. Events like the Hercules Hold, Yoke Race and pulling a real Viking ship are some of the ingredients of this fantastic show.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 2, Germany
programme.desc: The second stage of Strongman champions league will be hosted in Germany, by FIBO - the leading international trade show for fitness, wellness and health worldwide with 300,000 visitors in four days. Special implements like the biggest log in the world or the special Bavarian stone lift are not only a challenge, but also an opportunity for new personal, national and world records.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 3, Holland
programme.desc: Holland is hosting 12 different countries with 14 of the strongest men in the world for the third stage of the Strongman Champions League.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E04 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 4, Finland
programme.desc: Zydrunas Savickas, one of strongest people on earth is in this competition which has attracted the attention of the audience in the battle for the title of strongest man in Finland. The next round of SCL is in Bulgaria.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E05 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 5, Bulgaria
programme.desc: The next stage of the competition is in Bulgaria where Ervin Katona (SCL World Champion 2012) will compete for the last time.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 6, Latvia
programme.desc: Krzysztof Radzikowski, the leader in the league will fight hard to keep Dainis Zageris off from the title and to gather another 25 ranking points in this next stage in Latvia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 7, Croatia
programme.desc: The competition sees a close battle with a new world record in overhead dumbbell and close finishes throughout the day. This stage is in Croatia, in a city over 1700 years old, steeped in Roman tradition and history, the athletes arrive for the truck pull after a picturesque boat ride on the Adriatic Sea.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 8, Poland
programme.desc: We are now half way through the SCL 2015 and getting closer to the grand world finals in Turkey. The eighth stage is in Poland, the home country of the current leader Krzysztof Radzikowski.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 9, Austria
programme.desc: In this stage we go into the mountains of Austria to find out through six grueling events who is the strongest in the land of Alps. Martin Wildauer, current World Champion 2014 and Austrian local is competing alongside Zageris, Radzikowski, Belsak and many others.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 10, Romania
programme.desc: The 10th stage of this year's competition in Strongman Champions League is held in the Romanian city of Sibiu where the 12 strongmen continue to compete for the title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 SCL 2015 Season 2, Episode 11, World Log Lift Championship
programme.desc: The 11th stage is the SCL Log Lift World Championships in Lithuania. In this championship, each competitor must lift three different weights overhead. Zydrunas Savickas is the current world record holder in the Log Lift.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: GLORY 36 SuperFight Series is headlined by Congolese-German light heavyweight Danyo Ilunga throwing down with the Netherlands' Michael Duut. Armenian-Belgian power puncher Harut Grigorian battles 23-year-old German prospect Danijel Solaja at welterweight in the can't miss co-headline bout. Plus two Super Bantamweight Grand Prix bouts. Muay Thai champion and MMA star Tiffany van Soest meets Canadian challenger Jessica Gladstone in one semifinal match-up, while 21-year-old Dutch prospect Isis Verbeek takes on undefeated Amel Dehby of France. The winners of each semifinal match-up will advance to the Grand Prix tournament final – the opening bout of GLORY: COLLISION.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: The Lightweight title is on the line as Sittichai looks to defend his title against #1 challenger Marat Grigorian. There is also a four-man lightweight tournament on the card.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: It's the fight everyone wants to see as GLORY Heavyweight champion, Rico Verhoeven takes on Badr Hari. Plus, the Welterweight title is on the line as Nieky Holzken meets Cedric Doumbé.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: Brazilian GLORY middleweight champion Alex ‘Po Atan’ Pereira (31-6, 20 KO’s) headlines the GLORY 74 ARNHEM section of the card, putting his title on the line against Ertugul Bayrak (18-6, 5 KO’s) in a main event fight set for five rounds.

programme.title: GLORY Kickboxing
programme.desc: COLLISION 2 is headlined by GLORY world heavyweight champion Rico ‘The King of Kickboxing’ Verhoeven (55-10, 16 KO’s) and his arch-rival Badr Hari (106-13,92 KO’s), rematching three years on from their first epic encounter.

The event also featured qualification bouts for the Glory 70kg Slam Tournament.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Coach Dan Miller puts his wealth of experience and knowledge into helping fighters train properly and get ready to step into the cage the right way. He considers it a gift to be able to help Jess Elverum's MMA career.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Jesse Arnett attributes most of his success to his coaches, in particular Jake Peacock. Jake was born with only a partial arm. This coach and fighter doesn't let that stop him from training some of the best athletes in the world.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: Bill Mahood has studied every martial art imaginable, and he'll need all that experience when he takes on Kalil Ibrahim, a karate ans kickboxing expert. Steve Steinbeiss fights Jeff Ford, an MMA champion and a personal trainer on VH1's Celebrity Fight Club.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT
programme.desc: MMA Veteran Nick Thompson goes up against the brute force of wrestling star Davion Peterson. Thompson has more pro fight experience than anyone on the first series, and will need all of it to hold his own against the relentless Peterson.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E22 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Coaches in fight sport are at times an underrated but yet intergral part of an athlete's success. What makes them give up their day, weeks and years to help their fighters be the best in the world? This episode features Roy Harris as we delve into the life of a coach.
